name: openmm-lj13-cluster-v1
description: A live OpenMM Lennard-Jones cluster benchmark that tests whether the optimization loop can approach the accepted LJ13 global minimum on a rugged many-body energy landscape.
paper_hypothesis: The current agentic Autolab loop should expose its scaling and local-minima behavior on LJ13, making the gap to the accepted cluster minimum a useful many-body optimizer benchmark.

evaluation.reference_note: Accepted reduced-unit LJ13 global minimum energy, evaluated here with sigma = 1 and epsilon = 1 in OpenMM-native units.
